transcript.text:
[What are we doing at Ulleungdo today?] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[In this uniform?]
[Let's play in the water today!]
[Meet our fish friends]
[Enjoy the clear waters]
[What should you do after?]
[Eat some food]
[Tteokboki]
[Ulleungdo Squid Rice]
[Ulleungdo Squid Tempura]
[Cheese Donkatsu]
[Bujigaeni Kimbap] [Wild Leek Kimbap]
[Ulleungdo Squid Ramyun]
[Eat with no breaks]
[I'm in disbelief]
[Crushed the meal]

[With a round of applause]
[Let's go in the ocean!]
Hello everyone
I'm here to do scuba diving
It has been on my bucket list
So I'm looking forward to it
[Gyeongsangbuk-do, Ulleung-gun] [Ulleung Aqua Camp]
I'm getting no blood flow
[Changed into a skin scuba suit]
[Let's go to the waters]
[A picture-perfect Ulleungdo sky]
[This is where she will be diving today!]
We're going to go all the way to the end of the seawall
That's about 6 meters
That's where we will meet with all the fish
We'll also ride the scooter with the instructor

So clear!
[A clear, emerald-like water]
[Put on all the equipment]
[Cute]
[Lastly, the goggles]
Let's pretend water got in your goggles,
[Going over safety precautions]
[In the water]
[Let's go in now]
[Exciting]
[Welcome to the ocean]
[Underwater Scooter]
[A propulsion device to increase mobility in water]
[Wow, it's Tzuyang!]
[Let everyone know!]
[Hello guys]

[Feeling good]
[Exploring the waters]
[10 meters deep!]
[I'll go alone now!]
[She can do it on her own!]
[Hey, not bad]
[Popular amongst the fishies]
[Let's go up now]
[Come again!]
[Finished with scuba diving]
What would you say the water condition was like today?
I'd say around the middle for Ulleungdo water
Let's go eat now!
I'm here in the city
There's a bunsik (snack diner) place here in Ulleungdo
I've been craving that kind of food since I've been here for a while

This specific bunsik restaurant uses ingredients like wild leek
I'm very excited
[Gyeongsangbuk-do, Ulleung-gun] [Hwangso Restaurant]
It's cold!
Hello~!
[Reading the menu]
If you take a look at the menu,
You can see Ulleungdo squid ramyun,
Ulleungdo squid rice,
Ulleungdo food items
What kind of Kimbap (seaweed rolls) do you have?
Bujigaeni (Ulleungdo plant), and wild leek (garlic leek)
Leek kimbap? Wow, amazing
I'm going to have to try those
What kind of fried food do you have?
We currently only have squid tempura,

But it's very good because we use Ulleungdo squid
Live squid
Live and not frozen?
The size is different too
You'll die if you try it
[So good that she'll be finished]
I'm ready to order
I'll take those 2 kimbaps,
Ulleungdo squid ramyun,
Squid tempura,
Tteokboki (spicy rice cake),
Ulleungdo squid rice,
Cheese Donkatsu (pork cutlet), please
I'm going to eat the leftovers
[Sorry, there won't be any leftovers]
Let's get started

[Get the fire started]
[Get the secret sauce]
[And cook]
[Tteokboki]
[Squid rice]
[Ulleungdo Squid Rice]
[Ulleungdo Squid Tempura]
[Cheese Donkatsu (pork cutlet)]
[Seasoned rice]
[Wild leek]
[And also Bujigaeni]
[Bujigaeni & wild leek kimbap]
[High heat for ramyun noodles]
[Ulleungdo Squid Ramyun]
It's all here
Let's eat the noodles first

Bon appetit!
[It's still very hot]
[Be careful, take your time]
Oh no
[Here's some water]
Thank you
The squid gives it a very refreshing taste]
Some kimbap with this
Let's try the other one first Is this bujigaeni?
I think this is it
It has the Ulleungdo plant inside
Very savory and tasty
The squid is so tender
[Ramyun noodles are always great]
So good
[Get the exploded kimbap and get some soup]

Thank you
[Getting the full experience with some kimchi]
Kimchi tastes very good!
Kimchi tastes excellent
Everything's delicious in Ulleungdo, right?
Yes, they are!
Ulleungdo is the best
Let's finish the noodles first
I've been enjoying all the seafood here so far,
but I've been craving some bunsik food, especially the donkatsu
Let's have a bite of it
I've been craving it so much
Looks delicious
[Is that how you cut donkatsu?]
[Who eats donkatsu like that?]
Let's hurry and eat the squid tempura too

Tasty
There's a difference eating live squid tempura and frozen squid tempura
It's very chewy!
WIth some tteokboki sauce
[Probably trying to say that it's delicious]
The squid is different for sure
It's usually dry and tough to chew
But these are soft and tender
Some tteokboki now
I can taste a little bit of curry, am I right?
Yes
I don't like my tteokboki too sweet
This is just about right
The sauce is good
Wild leek kimbap now
It's literally kimbap with wild leek

Very moist and full of flavor
It's great
Let's eat the bujigaeni one too
The scent is very strong
[Some squid rice too]
There are people that like to mix vs not mix
It doesn't matter for me
This can't possibly go wrong
The sauce is yummy
When did you come to Ulleungdo?
It's been about 3 weeks
You're not missing Seoul?
I do, sometimes
But Ulleungdo is just so nice
Did you get to eat everything?
Yes, pretty much all the specialties

But this place is the best, right?
Of course, ma'am!
[Wanting to say that it's delicious]
Donkatsu
I'm currently addicted to donkatsu
I've been genuinely craving donkatsu
[Not getting full?]
[She usually just eats when she likes the food]
[Fully invested]
This is just a regular ramyun,
but the squid really makes it exceptional
The texture is so nice
Leek kimbap
With tteokboki sauce
I thought it won't taste too different because there's not much leek in here
But the leek flavor and scent spreads

Dip in the soup
It's my very first time trying bujigaeni plant
I might not like it
It's got that scent just like parsley and oak greens
That distinct herb scent
I can't eat it if it's too strong
But this one is manageable
You've already eaten this much?
We have today's sponsor
Wait, what is this?!
[With force]
Wait, is that the brass glass?
A glass that keeps the beverage cold
Is that really brass glass?
[Failed to keep a straight face]
[This is the brass shot glass]

[And this is the brass beer glass]
[Soju bottle from his pocket]
Perfect to drink some soju
Am I doing it right?
[Now that's too much lol]
[But advertisement continues]
[Soju shot with brass shot glass]
[That's the power of brass!]
Here, squid tempura
It tastes even better drinking out of the brass glass
[That's right!]
[Ad over]
[Thank you for helping us!]
Do you know Tzuyang too?
Have you heard of her?
No, first time seeing her today

She's the nation's best mukbanger
[Mukbang #1 currently eating a meal]
You probably can't raise her if she was your daughter, right?
[Food cost #1 too]
[I'm getting dizzy]
[Telling him what she ordered]
That's really amazing
Do you eat like this every day?
Then you must exercise every day?
I do not
[So how does that make sense?]
Leek tastes really good
This donkatsu makes me so happy
Let's put in some rice
I don't usually mix rice in my ramyun soup, but the squid really makes it a whole new dish
Finishing up with rice soup really does it for me

That was a good meal
[A round of applause from the audience]
Thank you
Thanks everyone!
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Shingwang Regional Children's Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
